description_long: This is a traditional-style faucet with a high, curved gooseneck spout and a single lever handle mounted to the side. The body and spout are robust, featuring decorative ridges and a dark, oil-rubbed bronze finish that gives it a vintage, elegant appearance. The handle is cylindrical with a rounded tip, designed for easy grip and operation. The spout arches gracefully, allowing for ample clearance beneath for filling containers or washing. The base is wide and sturdy, suggesting it is intended for deck-mount installation on a countertop or sink. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for upscale urban environments such as public restrooms, park facilities, or outdoor sinks.
description: A vintage-style, oil-rubbed bronze faucet with a high gooseneck spout and a single side lever handle. Its decorative ridges and robust build make it both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, arched spout and the single lever handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full curve of the gooseneck spout and the circular base.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle now on the left, showing the spout's arch and the detailed base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the uninterrupted curve of the spout and the solid, decorative base.
